title: Lizzy Pastel Collapsible Colander | Drain Basket Silicone Strainer Collapsing Food Sieve Foldable Draining Bowl for Pasta Vegetable Fruit Washer Folding Kitchen (Mint)
features: Space-Saving Design: The collapsible colander can be popped out to full size when in use and easily folded down to a more compact size for storage. This makes it a practical solution for kitchens with limited storage space or for those who need to maximize their kitchen organization.

Versatile Use: Ideal for small kitchens, camping, or caravanning, the colander's collapsible nature makes it convenient to transport. Its flexibility means it can be used both at home and on the go, providing a versatile straining solution for various settings.

Efficient Draining: The colander base is perforated with 2mm holes, allowing for quick and easy draining of water. This efficient design helps to speed up meal preparation, making it easier to rinse fruits, vegetables, pasta, and more without hassle.

Robust Construction: Made from hardwearing plastic and rubber, the colander is built to last. Its sturdy materials ensure durability and resistance to wear and tear, while its collapsible feature maintains its shape and functionality over time.

Ample Capacity: With a bowl diameter of approximately 23.5cm, the colander offers ample capacity for various kitchen tasks. Whether you're rinsing large quantities of produce or straining pasta, the colander provides sufficient space to handle different cooking needs.
